Customer fear:: A forged extension/offscreen message injects raw model output or fake local-only metadata.
Data that could leak:: rawText, jsonText, rawExcerpt, stack traces, fake model locality claims
Attacker control:: message type and payload fields sent across extension trust boundaries
Promise at risk:: CND messages must be exact-schema validated, not accepted by prefix or trust.
Protection proof:: message-boundary, model-output-trust and log-redaction security tests.
